margin.title: Profitability
margin.description: Realized revenue, cost of goods sold, and gross margin for the selected range. Cost comes from the exact lots consumed on each sale, falling back to the product cost when a line is not lot-tracked.
margin.error: The profitability report could not be loaded.

byProduct.title: By product
byProduct.emptyState: There are no completed sales in the selected dates. Adjust the range to see profitability by product.
